evals.name: AAP Governance Assessment
evals.prompt:
You are asked to audit an AAP platform's governance readiness before it goes into production use.

Describe your governance assessment methodology: what domains you assess, how you determine the scope (full vs scoped assessment), and what rating system you use for each domain.
evals.expected_output: A governance assessment covering 7 domains (Workflow Governance, Notification Coverage, Access Control/RBAC, Credential Security, Execution Environments, Workload Isolation, Audit Trail) plus a bonus domain (External Authentication), with PASS/GAP/WARN ratings per domain.
assertions: The output describes assessing 7 governance domains: Workflow Governance, Notification Coverage, Access Control/RBAC, Credential Security, Execution Environments, Workload Isolation, and Audit Trail.
The output describes supporting both full platform assessment (all domains) and scoped assessment (specific domains based on user request).
The output describes rating each domain with a structured outcome (PASS, GAP, or WARN) rather than just descriptive text.
The output describes external authentication (LDAP, SAML, SSO) as a bonus assessment domain.
